title: Tri Love Bracelet – Set of 3 Rose Quartz, Howlite & Amethyst Crystal Bracelets
short_description: A set of three stretch crystal bracelets in soft Rose Quartz, white Howlite and purple Amethyst, finished with a silver-toned owl charm. Wear all three together or style them one at a time.
body_html:
Celebrate love in all its forms with the Tri Love Bracelet — a thoughtfully designed set of three crystal bracelets that speaks to self-love, emotional harmony and a calm, peaceful mind.

The trio brings together soft Rose Quartz beads, white Howlite, purple Amethyst and polished silver-toned accents. One bracelet is finished with a detailed owl charm, adding a symbolic touch of wisdom, awareness and thoughtful love.

Wear all three together for a layered crystal statement, or style them separately according to your mood. With their pastel colours, faceted beads and flexible slip-on construction, they slip naturally into everyday, festive and gifting looks.

Why you'll love it

  • Three bracelets in one set — coordinated crystal bracelets you can wear together, individually, or share with someone special.
  • Love-inspired crystal combination — Rose Quartz, Howlite and Amethyst, traditionally linked with love, calmness and emotional balance.
  • Meaningful owl charm — a silver-toned owl that traditionally represents wisdom, intuition and awareness.
  • Soft, elegant palette — pale pink, white, purple and silver tones for a clean, graceful look.
  • Flexible slip-on design — a stretch-style build that slides on easily, no clasp needed.

Crafted with

  • Rose Quartz beads — the soft pink foundation of the trio, traditionally associated with unconditional love, self-acceptance and emotional warmth.
  • Howlite beads — white beads with delicate grey marbling, traditionally linked with patience, relaxation and a steady mind.
  • Amethyst beads — purple accents that add depth, traditionally connected with inner peace, clarity and emotional balance.
  • Silver-toned owl charm — the central highlight of one bracelet, representing wisdom and thoughtful decision-making.
  • Metallic spacer beads — smooth silver-toned spacers that add shine and balance.
  • Flexible stretch cord — durable elastic that lets each bracelet slide on without a clasp.

Crystal properties are based on traditional beliefs and are not intended as medical claims.
seo_title: Tri Love Bracelet – Set of 3 Crystal Bracelets
seo_description: Set of 3 stretch crystal bracelets in Rose Quartz, Howlite & Amethyst with a silver owl charm. For love, calm & balance. Ships in 24 hrs, COD.

metafields.highlights: Set of three coordinated stretch bracelets · Rose Quartz, Howlite & Amethyst beads · Detailed silver-toned owl charm · Soft pink, white & purple palette · Flexible slip-on design · Wear together or separately · Ideal for everyday styling and gifting
metafields.material_or_ingredients: Rose Quartz beads, white Howlite beads, purple Amethyst beads, silver-toned owl charm, silver-toned metallic spacer beads, durable elastic stretch cord.
metafields.care_or_directions: Slip each bracelet gently over the wrist; do not over-stretch the elastic cord. Keep away from water, perfume and harsh chemicals to preserve shine. Wipe with a soft dry cloth and store flat in a pouch when not worn.
metafields.shipping: Ships in 24 hrs · COD available · Free shipping over ₹499

faqs.q: How many bracelets are in the set?
faqs.a: The Tri Love Bracelet is a set of three coordinated crystal bracelets — Rose Quartz, white Howlite and purple Amethyst with a silver-toned owl charm.
Yes, the set uses natural-look Rose Quartz, Howlite and Amethyst beads. As with all natural stones, subtle variations in colour and marbling make each bracelet unique.

faqs.q: Will the bracelets fit my wrist?
faqs.a: Each bracelet has a flexible stretch cord that slips on easily and comfortably fits most wrist sizes — no clasp needed.

faqs.q: Can I wear the bracelets separately?
faqs.a: Absolutely. Wear all three stacked for a layered look, pick one to match your mood, or create a two-bracelet stack.

faqs.q: Do the crystals have any healing benefits?
faqs.a: Rose Quartz, Howlite and Amethyst are traditionally associated with love, calmness and emotional balance. These are based on traditional beliefs and are not medical claims.
Yes — it's a thoughtful set for birthdays, anniversaries, friendship celebrations, Valentine's Day and self-care gifting, and comes ready to gift.

page_blocks.subtitle: Set of 3 Crystals | Love & Calm Energy | Slip-On Everyday Wear
page_blocks.product_brief: The Tri Love Bracelet is a set of three stretch crystal bracelets in soft Rose Quartz, white Howlite and purple Amethyst, finished with a silver-toned owl charm. Together they celebrate self-love, calm and emotional balance. Stack all three or wear them one at a time — for yourself or someone you love.
page_blocks.what_we_put_in:
✦ Rose Quartz Beads – soft pink stones traditionally linked with love, compassion and emotional warmth
✦ Howlite Beads – white marbled beads associated with patience, calm and a steady mind
✦ Amethyst Beads – purple accents connected with inner peace, clarity and balance
✦ Silver-Toned Owl Charm – a symbolic touch of wisdom, intuition and awareness
✦ Metallic Spacer Beads – smooth silver-toned spacers that add shine and separation
✦ Flexible Stretch Cord – durable elastic that lets each bracelet slip on without a clasp
page_blocks.product_benefits:
✨ Encourages Self-Love
Rose Quartz is traditionally associated with self-acceptance, compassion and emotional warmth.
✨ Supports a Calm Mindset
Howlite and Amethyst are commonly linked with relaxation, patience and peaceful energy.
✨ Promotes Emotional Balance
A gentle symbolic reminder to stay centred, soft and emotionally aware.
✨ Multiple Styling Options
Wear all three together, choose one for your mood, or build a two-bracelet stack.
✨ Adds a Soft Crystal Statement
Pastel colours and silver accents elevate any outfit without feeling heavy.
✨ Easy Everyday Wear
The stretchable design makes each bracelet simple to slip on and take off.
page_blocks.product_details:
Plating: Silver-Toned Accents
Base Metal: Alloy Spacers & Owl Charm
Color: Pink, White, Purple & Silver
Finish: Polished Faceted Beads
Construction: Elastic Stretch Cord (Slip-On)
Set: 3 Bracelets
detail_points: 💗 Three coordinated crystal bracelets in one thoughtful set
🦉 Detailed silver-toned owl charm for wisdom and awareness
🔮 Rose Quartz, Howlite & Amethyst for love, calm and balance
🤍 Flexible slip-on stretch cord fits most wrists with no clasp
page_blocks.product_specification:
Product Name: Tri Love Bracelet
Design: Set of 3 Beaded Stretch Bracelets with Owl Charm
Material: Rose Quartz, Howlite & Amethyst Beads with Silver-Toned Alloy Accents
Color: Pink, White, Purple & Silver
Net Quantity: 3 Bracelets
Country of Origin: India
page_blocks.how_to_use:
1. Gently slip each bracelet over your hand and onto your wrist without over-stretching the cord.
2. Stack all three together for a layered look, or wear one at a time to match your mood.
3. Remove before bathing, swimming or applying perfume, and store flat in a pouch to keep the shine.
